chunks.text: Analog Generators for SerDes Clock Generation and Distribution (EECS-2023-36) by Zhongkai Wang and Elad Alon. Human Intranet: Connecting Wearable and Implantable Devices (EECS-2021-221) by Ali Moin, Jan M. Rabaey and Elad Alon. An Open, Scalable Massive MIMO Testbed Operating at E-Band Frequencies (EECS-2020-194) by James Dunn.

Scalable RF Receivers for Large Antenna Arrays (EECS-2020-188) by Konstantin Trotskovsky. Neuromodulation IC for System Integration and Self-Interference Cancellation (EECS-2019-157) by Seobin Jung. System Architecture and Signal Processing Techniques for Massive Multi-user Antenna Arrays (EECS-2019-149) by Antonio Puglielli, Borivoje Nikolic and Elad Alon.

OMNI: A Distributed, Modular, Closed-Loop Neuromodulation Device for the Treatment of Neuropsychiatric Disorders (EECS-2017-178) by Ali Moin, Jan M. Rabaey and Elad Alon. An Integrated Multilevel Converter with Sigma Delta Control for LED Lighting (EECS-2017-73) by Daniel Gerber. RF Transmitter Design for Large Array Applications (EECS-2017-11) by Pengpeng Lu and Elad Alon.

Next Generation Memory Interfaces (EECS-2015-111) by Miron Veryanskiy, Kyle Dillon, Kalika Saxena, Sinan Liu and Chenyang Xu. Design of Multi-Gb/s Multi-Coefficient Mixed-Signal Equalizers (EECS-2014-189) by Chintan Thakkar and Elad Alon. Design of a system for cm-range wireless communication (EECS-2009-184) by Simone Gambini, Jan M. Rabaey and Elad Alon.
NEM Relay Memory Design (EECS-2009-83) by Abhinav Gupta and Elad Alon.
